title: full optimization
description: full optimization modpack, this is an optimization modpack that does only one function and that is to optimize minecraft
body:
this is an optimization modpack, this modpack has all optimization mods namely 23 mods and all mons perform minecraft optimization function, my serend fps on my laptop was 300 fps, also this modpack solves memory leak problems and minecraft itself will launch at the speed of light 

if you have a weak laptop or PC, then try to install this modpack and you will see a significant increase in fps

and at all, this modpack perfectly optimizes the game, there should be no problems, but if there are, please tell me about it in my discord server
